action_set_definitions.name: get_system_clock
action_set_definitions.description: Retrieves the current simulation time to monitor deadlines.

action_set_definitions.name: get_ticket_details
action_set_definitions.description: Retrieves comprehensive information about a specific incident ticket, including priority, history, and current logs.

ticket_id.description: The unique identifier for the ticket (e.g., INC-9921).

example_output.description: Critical database failure in production cluster.

action_set_definitions.name: query_agent_roster
action_set_definitions.description: Filters the roster to find available agents based on region, shift status, and technical tier level.

min_tier.description: The minimum technical tier required for the incident.

action_set_definitions.name: post_ticket_csa
action_set_definitions.description: Updates a ticket with a Current State Assessment (CSA) report required for handoff.

csa_summary.description: Detailed technical summary of the current state and steps taken.

action_set_definitions.name: assign_ticket
action_set_definitions.description: Formally changes the ownership of a ticket to a new agent.

target_agent_id.description: The ID of the agent receiving the ticket.

action_set_definitions.name: log_protocol_compliance
action_set_definitions.description: Finalizes the handoff by logging that all high-severity/FTS protocols have been satisfied.

state_description.tickets: A list of active and historical tickets in the system.
state_description.agent_roster: Mapping of agent IDs to their availability and tier level.
